title: Mock Test 40 - Intermediate Mixed Review
description: Level 2 (Test 21-39) মিশ্র ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Subject-Verb Agreement, Pronouns, Adjectives, Adverbs, Question Tags, Wh-Questions, Voice, Modals, Conditionals, Direct/Indirect Speech, Relative Clauses, Gerund/Infinitive — সব টপিক থেকে।

questions.question: Which sentence has correct subject-verb agreement?
options: The list of items are on the table.
The list of items is on the table.
The list of items were on the table.
The list of items have been on the table.
questions.explanation: Subject = 'The list' (singular), তাই 'is' হবে। 'of items' — prepositional phrase, এটি subject নয়।

questions.question: He is ___ than his brother.
questions.explanation: Comparative degree: tall → taller (দুজনের মধ্যে তুলনা)।

questions.question: ___ does the train arrive? — At 6 PM.
questions.explanation: উত্তর 'At 6 PM' সময় নির্দেশ করছে, তাই 'When'।

questions.question: She sings ___. Everyone loves her voice.
questions.explanation: 'Sings' verb কে modify করছে → adverb 'beautifully'।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She don't like coffee.'
questions.explanation: She (3rd person) → 'doesn't' হবে, 'don't' নয়।

questions.question: You are coming to the party, ___?
questions.explanation: Affirmative sentence → Negative tag। 'You are' → 'aren't you?'

questions.question: This book is ___, not yours.
questions.explanation: Possessive Pronoun (noun ছাড়া) → 'mine'। 'my' এর পরে noun লাগে।

questions.question: The letter ___ by her yesterday.
questions.explanation: Yesterday → Past, Passive → was/were + V3। 'was written'।

questions.question: You ___ see a doctor. You look very sick.
questions.explanation: পরামর্শ → 'should' (উচিত)।

questions.question: If I were you, I ___ the job.
questions.explanation: Type 2 Conditional: If + Past Simple → would + V1।

questions.question: Error Detection: 'There is many books on the table.'
questions.explanation: 'Many books' plural, so 'There are' হবে।

questions.question: She said that she ___ the project already.
questions.explanation: Indirect Speech backshift: Present Perfect → Past Perfect। 'had finished'।

questions.question: The woman ___ lives next door is a doctor.
questions.explanation: Person (woman) → 'who'।

questions.question: I enjoy ___ new people.
questions.explanation: 'Enjoy' verb → Gerund (meeting)।

questions.question: Fill: 'I have never ___ to London.'
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: have/has + V3 (been)।

questions.question: Fill: 'There isn't ___ milk in the fridge.'
questions.explanation: Negative sentence → 'any'।

questions.question: Fill: 'Neither of the answers ___ correct.'
questions.explanation: 'Neither' singular, তাই 'is'।

questions.question: Fill: 'He would have passed if he ___ harder.'
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had + V3 → would have + V3। 'had studied'।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে প্রতিদিন স্কুলে যায়।'
options: He go to school every day.
He goes to school every day.
He is going to school every day.
He went to school every day.
questions.explanation: Present Indefinite (habit): He + V+s (goes)।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি যদি পাখি হতাম, তাহলে উড়ে বেড়াতাম।'
options: If I am a bird, I will fly.
If I were a bird, I would fly.
If I was a bird, I would fly.
If I am a bird, I would fly.
questions.explanation: Unreal present → Type 2: If + were, would + V1।
